product_path.rationale: Traders need instant intervention during live sessions — can't switch browser tabs away from trading platform

user_journey.trigger: User feels anxious or impulsive during a live trade
user_journey.entry: One-tap opens breathing screen with current market context
user_journey.action: Complete 20-second guided breathing + optional chart coaching
user_journey.outcome: Anxiety settles, user makes calmer trading decision instead of revenge-trading

screens.name: Breathe
screens.purpose: 20-second guided breathing exercise with haptic pacing and timer

screens.name: Context
screens.purpose: AI chart coaching based on current market position and emotional state

screens.name: Track
screens.purpose: Log trades and emotional triggers to identify patterns over time

p0: 20-second guided breathing with haptic pacing and countdown
One-tap emergency calm mode accessible from lock screen
Basic trade logging with emotion tagging
p1: AI chart analysis and position coaching
Pattern recognition for emotional trading triggers
